info.title: Apex Generation API
info.description:
Apex REST API for AI content generation.

## Providers

- **ComfyUI**: Custom workflow-based generation (T2I, I2I)
- **Grok**: xAI's image and video generation (T2I, I2I, T2V, I2V)

## Authentication

Authentication is handled via OAuth2/JWT (implementation pending).

negative_prompt.default: waxy texture, blurry face, over-sharpening, unrealistic symmetry, flat lighting, low detail skin, extra fingers, distorted anatomy, deformed

UserRole.title: UserRole
UserRole.description:
User account roles.

SYSTEM — internal sentinel user (seeded by migration, cannot authenticate).
ADMIN  — full administrative access to the platform.
USER   — standard authenticated user (default for all registrations).
